results.title: A Hitchhiker's Guide to Speculative Decoding - PyTorch
results.content: Speculative decoding is an optimization technique for inference that makes educated guesses about future tokens while generating the current token.

results.title: Looking back at speculative decoding - Google Research
results.content: Speculative decoding is the application of speculative sampling to inference from autoregressive models, like transformers.

results.title: A Survey of Speculative Decoding Techniques in LLM Inference
results.content: Speculative decoding is a powerful technique to accelerate inference in autoregressive LLMs.

results.title: An Introduction to Speculative Decoding for Reducing ...
results.content: Speculative decoding is an inference optimization technique that accelerates large language models (LLMs).

results.title: Accelerating Language Model Inference with Mixture of Attentions: Speculative Decoding 2.0
results.content: Speculative decoding is a two-step process involving a smaller draft model and a larger verification model.

results.title: Speculative decoding | LLM Inference Handbook - BentoML
results.content: Speculative decoding is an inference-time optimization that speeds up LLM token generation without reducing output quality.

results.title: Speculative Speculative Decoding
results.content: Speculative decoding accelerates sampling from a target distribution by using a cheaper draft distribution.

results.title: Speculative Speculative Decoding | OpenReview
results.content: We introduce speculative speculative decoding (SSD) to parallelize these operations.

results.title: A Theoretical Perspective for Speculative Decoding Algorithm | OpenReview
results.content: Speculative Decoding employs a small model to sample draft tokens and a large model to validate.

results.title: Speculative Decoding - vLLM Documentation
results.content: This document shows how to use Speculative Decoding with vLLM to reduce inter-token latency.
